name: Daily Stripe revenue snapshot
prompt: Pull today's Stripe charges, refunds, balance. Compute consultancy revenue. Save to outputs/daily/{date}.json.

name: Monday PP P&L
prompt: Past 7 days: retainer revenue, sprint revenue, course/template revenue, ad spend (PP-side, not client-side), contribution margin. Output to outputs/weekly-pnl-{date}.md.

name: 1st of month invoice batch
prompt: For each retainer client, draft an invoice via /skill docx + Stripe Composio. Save as Gmail draft for Caner approval. Never auto-send.

name: Monthly close PP
prompt: Last day of month only: monthly P&L for PP. Track against PP-side £15k MRR target (or whatever target is set). Email Caner.
